free_text: Excited states of the mirror nuclei, 7Li and 7Be
The lithium targets were made by evaporation in on
'oven' directly below the target chamber and a
beryllium foil ( 10 keV energy loss for 1 MeV protons)
leaving the magnetic spectrometer by either an
ionization chamber or by a scin.counter.
The gamma radiation was monitored with a Geiger
